message:
fix(triage): group tracks by topological depth instead of connected components

Fixes issue #68: --robot-triage-by-track now groups independent tasks
together for parallel execution instead of creating one track per task.

The new layering algorithm:
- Layer 0 (track-A): All currently actionable items (no open blockers)
- Layer 1 (track-B): Items blocked only by layer-0 items
- Layer N: Items blocked only by layer-(N-1) items

This enables multi-agent orchestration tools to properly parallelize
work across multiple agents, since all items in the same track can
be worked on simultaneously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
